Build state-specific mortality probability vectors from baseline qx and HRs

Source: R/utils-engine.R
dot-build_mortality_vec.Rd

Applies age-band-specific mortality hazard ratios to the baseline NW mortality vector qx. Banding: age < 35 uses HR = 1; 35 <= age < 50 uses the row where age_lower == 35; 50 <= age < 70 uses age_lower == 50; age >= 70 uses age_lower == 70 (the same band is used above age 89).

Usage

.build_mortality_vec(qx, mortality_hr, ages)

Arguments

qx

Named numeric of NW mortality probabilities; names are ages as character.

mortality_hr

Data frame with columns age_lower, OW, OB1, OB2 (three rows).

ages

Integer vector of model ages to process.

Value

List with elements NW, OW, OB1, OB2, each a numeric vector the length of ages.

On this page
